name: Beijing Hualian Hypermarket Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Hualian Hypermarket Co., Ltd. sells food and non-food items through department stores in China. The company's stores offer knitted products, daily sundries, fruits and vegetables, grains and oil foods, non-staple foods, and other products. It also leases commercial facilities and operating sites. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Beijing, China.
